description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.6 Docker image for Ruby jobs and the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service for dependency scanning. Define four stages: build, test, codequality, and security. In the build stage add a job named build that runs gem install bundler --no-document then bundle update, and publishes Gemfile.lock as an artifact. In the test stage add a job named test that runs gem install bundler --no-document, bundle update, and rake test using ruby:2.6. In the codequality stage add a job named rubocop that installs rubocop rubocop-performance rubocop-rails --no-document and then runs rubocop. In the security stage add a job named dependency_scanning that sets SP_VERSION=$(echo "$CI_SERVER_VERSION" | sed 's/^\([0-9]*\)\.\([0-9]*\).*/\1-\2-stable/') and executes docker run --env DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS="${DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS:-false}" --volume "$PWD:/code" --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock "registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dependency-scanning:$SP_VERSION" /code, uses docker:stable image, docker:stable-dind service, defines DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 variable, and stores gl-dependency-scanning-report.json as an artifact.
